query: 10TB dataset cost PostgreSQL MongoDB DynamoDB monthly pricing
answer: For a 10TB dataset, PostgreSQL costs vary based on infrastructure, MongoDB Atlas ranges from $8-$30/month, and DynamoDB charges $0.25/GB per month for standard storage.

results.title: MongoDB Pricing: Plans, Costs & Hidden Fees 2026 - CheckThat.ai
results.snippet: Actual costs extend beyond base cluster pricing to include data transfer, add-on services, and support tiers that significantly impact total cost of ownership. MongoDB offers four pricing tiers: Free (M0) for development, Flex for variable workloads, Dedicated for production, and Serverless for unpredictable traffic. However, be aware that multi-region deployments will triple your base infrastructure costs, and write-heavy workloads may benefit from Flex Tier's capped monthly pricing ($8-$30/month) instead of per-operation billing. Alternatively, the Atlas Flex Tier uses tiered monthly pricing ($8-$30/month based on operations-per-second capacity) that caps costs and eliminates overage charges, providing predictable expenses for production workloads while maintaining the flexibility to handle traffic bursts without additional fees. Beyond base cluster costs, MongoDB charges for data transfer, storage overages, add-on services, and support tiers. LDAP integration and customer-managed encryption keys require paid add-ons on Basic/Developer/Pro tiers (pricing not publicly disclosed by MongoDB) but are included by default with Enterprise and Platinum support.

results.title: MongoDB Pricing
results.snippet: Choosing the right MongoDB Atlas cluster tier for your application involves considering the application's workload, data size, and performance needs. For Dedicated clusters, use Atlas Online Archive to tier infrequently accessed data, which will reduce primary storage costs. results.title: DynamoDB Pricing Calculator - On-Demand vs Provisioned Cost Estimator | Cloud Burn
results.snippet: dynamodb-pricing-calculatoraws-dynamodb-pricing-calculator. dynamodb-pricing-calculatoraws-dynamodb-pricing-calculatoramazon-dynamodb-pricing-calculator. # DynamoDB Pricing Calculator - On-Demand vs Provisioned Cost Estimator. AWS DynamoDB pricing calculator to compare on-demand vs provisioned capacity costs. Estimate monthly Amazon DynamoDB costs with storage, Global Tables, PITR, and Streams. How accurate is this DynamoDB pricing calculator? This DynamoDB pricing calculator uses official AWS pricing data updated regularly from Amazon's public pricing API. Should I use on-demand or provisioned capacity for DynamoDB? DynamoDB pricing includes: **Capacity charges** (WRU/RRU for on-demand or WCU/RCU-hours for provisioned), **Storage** ($0.25/GB-month standard, $0.10/GB-month for Standard-IA), and optional features like **Global Tables**, **Point-in-Time Recovery** ($0.20/GB-month), and **DynamoDB Streams**. The DynamoDB Free Tier (always free, not just 12 months) includes **25 GB of storage**, **25 WCU and 25 RCU** for provisioned capacity, or **200 million requests/month** for on-demand mode, plus **2.5 million DynamoDB Streams read requests**. Use this calculator to estimate multi-region costs by enabling Global Tables and specifying the number of regions. ## AWS CodePipeline Pricing Calculator - V1 vs V2 Cost Estimator.
